html: This just means I am done with buying game consoles. I'll be done with buying any new games soon. I've been around long enough where there is a backlog of games that can last for the rest of my life. I don't need $2000 video cards, tomorrow's hardware, and MMOs driven by big corps. Indie devs will still exist for the people who wish to keep buying games for PCs. Hopefully Linux takes off in that world. Who even knows how much longer we'll be able to buy our own hardware that isn't infested with some sort of regulatory must connect to the Internet kind of garbage. I'm passing the baton. I'm just done.
